creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: I believe this is because the update to gutenprint 5.3.3 added ppd files to /usr/local/share/cups/model, so now CUPS picks up these ppd files in addition to models provided by libexec/cups/driver/gutenprint.5.3.  Gutenprint should work without these ppd files and removing them would make the package a lot smaller too.
